statement.en: Classification de données fonctionnelles et vectorielles

proposer: Boubacar Diallo, Ndèye Niang, Feriel Bouhadjera et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Provisional axiom from preprint dated 2026-04-25 (future date, speculative document). Functional and vectorial data classification is an active research domain with evolving methodologies. Status cannot be confirmed as TRUE until peer-reviewed publication and independent validation. The work appears sound in approach but lacks establishment as proven theorem.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 関数データと離散ベクトルを繋ぐ無限の見えない橋。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 連続の優雅さと離散の棘が絡み合い、分類という光へ昇る。
